name: Service Requests by Project
query: SELECT name AS "Заявка:Link/Service Request:150", project AS "Проект:Link/Service Project:180", status AS "Статус:Data:120", priority AS "Приоритет:Data:120", assigned_to AS "Назначено:Link/User:180", modified AS "Изменен:Datetime:160" FROM `tabService Request` WHERE (%(project)s IS NULL OR project = %(project)s) ORDER BY modified DESC

name: Invoices by Project
query: SELECT name AS "Счет:Link/Invoice:150", project AS "Проект:Link/Service Project:180", counterparty_name AS "Контрагент:Data:180", counterparty_type AS "Тип контрагента:Data:140", status AS "Статус:Data:120", amount AS "Сумма:Currency:120", invoice_date AS "Дата счета:Date:120", modified AS "Изменен:Datetime:160" FROM `tabInvoice` WHERE (%(project)s IS NULL OR project = %(project)s) ORDER BY modified DESC

name: Project Profitability
query: WITH invoice_summary AS (SELECT project, SUM(CASE WHEN counterparty_type='Customer' AND status!='Cancelled' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS customer_invoices, SUM(CASE WHEN counterparty_type='Subcontractor' AND status!='Cancelled' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS subcontractor_invoices FROM `tabInvoice` GROUP BY project) SELECT p.name AS "Проект:Link/Service Project:150", COALESCE(s.customer_invoices,0) AS "Счета (клиент):Currency:150", COALESCE(s.subcontractor_invoices,0) AS "Счета (субподрядчик):Currency:180", COALESCE(s.customer_invoices,0) - COALESCE(s.subcontractor_invoices,0) AS "Прибыль:Currency:150" FROM `tabService Project` p LEFT JOIN invoice_summary s ON s.project = p.name GROUP BY p.name, p.modified ORDER BY p.modified DESC

name: Unassigned Service Requests
query: SELECT name AS "Заявка:Link/Service Request:150", status AS "Статус:Data:120", priority AS "Приоритет:Data:120", modified AS "Изменен:Datetime:160" FROM `tabService Request` WHERE assigned_to IS NULL AND status != 'Closed' ORDER BY modified DESC

name: Open Service Requests by Engineer
query: SELECT COALESCE(assigned_to, 'Не назначено') AS "Инженер:Data:200", COUNT(*) AS "Открытых заявок:Int:100" FROM `tabService Request` WHERE status != 'Closed' GROUP BY assigned_to ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

name: Due Service Maintenance Schedules
query: SELECT name AS "График:Link/Service Maintenance Schedule:150", schedule_name AS "Название:Data:200", customer AS "Клиент:Link/Customer:180", next_due_date AS "Следующая дата:Date:140" FROM `tabService Maintenance Schedule` WHERE next_due_date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY next_due_date
